purpose: Local deterministic budgets for package size and startup/import smoke. Ceilings are intentionally explicit so regressions are visible before publish or handoff.

calibrationPolicy.tighteningRule: After calibrationPolicy.requiredSuccessfulRuns successful runs on a clean built tree, set each ceiling to the greater of actual * 1.35 or actual + the smallest practical fixed buffer.

fileSize.rationale: SDK root import should remain a small wrapper over generated code, not a bundled application. Recalibrated from 4500 after the reports/bulk/compose subpath root re-exports plus the ensureClient rename grew the barrel to ~4978 bytes (actual + ~10% headroom).

CJS root import should stay close to ESM size after dual-build emit. Recalibrated from 20500 after the reports/bulk/compose subpath root re-exports plus the ensureClient rename grew the CJS barrel to ~21143 bytes (actual + ~11% headroom).
CLI startup entrypoint should remain lightweight and command-dispatch oriented. Calibrated from measured baseline of 5776 bytes.
MCP stdio entrypoint should not absorb generated SDK internals or fixture data. Tightened from 1700 to roughly 1.10x the measured 1110-byte baseline, rounded to the next practical 10-byte step.

timing.name: sdk-esm-import
timing.rationale: A consumer should be able to import the SDK root without expensive runtime setup. Calibrated from measured baseline ~240ms.

timing.name: cli-version
timing.rationale: The CLI should print version/help quickly before any Clockify network setup. Calibrated from measured baseline ~185ms.

timing.name: mcp-tools-list
timing.rationale: MCP clients should be able to discover the 143-tool surface quickly on local stdio startup. Calibrated from measured baseline ~440ms.
